case_title: ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC VS. MAHER MOKATISH ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 200026059) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MOKATISH, MAHER
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-16-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION IN OPPOSITION TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (DECLARATIONS) (TRANSACTION ID # 210004044) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC

SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (CCP 585(D), CCP 1033) (TRANSACTION ID # 200042031) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200042031) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF KRISTEN DEAN IN OPPOSITION TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 200042878) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC
DECLARATION RE: MILITARY STATUS OF DEFENDANT(S); NOTICE PURSUANT TO CCP 1033(B)(2) (TRANSACTION ID # 200042031) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-16-2021 CONTINUED TO JAN-11-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOKATISH, MAHER $11,422.64 PRINCIPAL, $450.16 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,872.80, SEE SCANNED DOC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-12-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MOKATISH, MAHER DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-24-2021

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $450.16 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 200042031) AS TO DEFENDANT MOKATISH, MAHER

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200019997), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC SERVED NOV-17-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE NOV-18-2020 AS TO DEFENDANT MOKATISH, MAHER
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-11-2022 CONTINUED TO APR-12-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
